summary: Testing 3 bug fixes for MOM user flow: PDF download, Date picker modals, and Keyboard handling. Backend API tested successfully. Frontend UI testing limited by known Playwright+React Native Web Pressable button incompatibility.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web Pressable components not responsive to Playwright click/keyboard events (known limitation from iteration 1-2)

action_items: PDF Download fix VERIFIED via code review and backend API test (token=sessionToken destructuring is correct)
Date Picker modal implementations VERIFIED via code review - both profile.tsx and timeline.tsx have proper Modal+HTML input on web
Keyboard handling VERIFIED via code review - KeyboardAvoidingView + 350px bottom spacer + scrollToEnd on focus
critical_code_review_comments: POSITIVE: PDF download (birth-plan.tsx line 54) correctly uses `const { sessionToken: token } = useAuthStore()` - the fix is valid
POSITIVE: Date pickers (profile.tsx lines 343-388, timeline.tsx lines 296-350) properly show Modal with HTML date input on web platform
POSITIVE: Keyboard handling (birth-plan.tsx lines 380-451) uses KeyboardAvoidingView with proper offset + large bottom spacer
NOTE: Browser-based date input uses native browser calendar, not a custom shadcn calendar - this is intentional for React Native Web compatibility

success_rate.backend: 100% (PDF endpoint tested via curl - returns valid 5KB PDF)
success_rate.frontend: Unable to test UI interactions due to Playwright+React Native Web limitation

context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright cannot interact with React Native Web Pressable components (buttons, tabs). Use API testing or manual verification for UI flows. Login via localStorage injection doesn't work because Zustand store state isn't synced with localStorage on page navigation.

pdf_download.details: Backend returns valid PDF (5105 bytes). Frontend code correctly destructures sessionToken from authStore.

date_picker_profile.details: Modal shows HTML date input when Platform.OS === 'web' (lines 344-388)

date_picker_timeline.details: Modal shows HTML date input when Platform.OS === 'web' (lines 296-350)

keyboard_handling.details: KeyboardAvoidingView with 100px offset + 350px bottom spacer + scrollToEnd on TextInput focus
